stories: Good morning Sean, it's Wednesday, the fifteenth of April, 2026
Today is the birthday of Leonardo da Vinci - born in Tuscany on this day in 1452
He never considered any field off-limits, and that is worth carrying into the day
Over in Singapore, the Monetary Authority has tightened its monetary policy settings in response to yesterday's Q1 growth figures
6 percent year on year in the first quarter - solid on the surface - but the central bank flagged that growth will slow through the rest of the year
MAS raised its 2026 inflation forecast to between 1
The driver is energy price risk from the US-Iran conflict, with oil holding above 100 dollars a barrel
Worth noting for travellers - Singapore Airlines is continuing to reroute its Asia-Europe services around closed Iranian airspace
Good morning Sean, it's Tuesday, the fourteenth of April, 2026
Here's your fact for today: exactly seventy years ago this morning, engineers at Ampex Corporation in Redwood City, California demonstrated the world's first practical videotape recorder
Before that moment, replaying a television broadcast meant filming the screen with a film camera
Within a year, the device was in every major broadcast studio
The rotating drum-head technology that made it work is still the core principle behind every modern hard drive
Your calendar looks relatively clear today
If there's a Safe Start check-in with the North American team, it will land later this evening your time, so a good window to keep the afternoon focused
Over in Singapore, the Maritime Port Authority investigation into the Evergreen boxship Ever Lenient fire is still ongoing
